name: REXT,Inc.
summary: REXT, Inc., through its subsidiaries, operates in the retail business. It sells casual clothing and accessories. The company also offer interior goods, such as tables, seat chairs, storages, frames, clocks, stools, etc.; and household goods comprising mugs, bottles, aprons, mats, cover rings, pajamas, etc., as well as various miscellaneous goods. In addition, it sells game and video software, as well as music, books, cosmetics, stationery products, mobile phones, and other products. The company is based in Shinjuku, Japan.
